raw: Located just steps away from downtown Boston, a visit to the Boch Center Wang Theatre will make you feel like you've been magically transported to a European Palace. Tours of the theatre are offered several days per week and share the rich history of the Wang Theatre over the past 100 years. Beyond the basic theatre history, a tour includes the opportunity to experience the Folk Americana Roots Hall of Fame (FARHOF). FARHOF showcases the history of American music through multiple exhibits that change quarterly. Visits are available at set times each day and full tours may not be available on all days. Please visit www.bochcenter.org/tours to learn more about the schedule and availability. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
